title: Podman cannot change file permissions inside of the container if located outside of $HOME
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

When trying to run container with option to mount a file into the path, and changing the file permissions like this:
-v /etc/krb5.conf:/etc/krb5.conf:ro,Z"

It fails to the error: 
Error: error preparing container 0064508ba2c2e530da6d592a68580f38612237c13c24113b58bb51b384516a19 for attach: setxattr /etc/krb5.conf: operation not supported

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. podman machine init --cpus=4 --disk-size=60 --memory=6096 -v $HOME:$HOME
NOTE: I've tried the "-v /:/" and "-v $HOME:/" and also "-v $HOME:$HOME -v /etc/:/etc/" but none of these worked

2. podman machine start

3. podman run <my_container> -v /etc/krb5.conf:/etc/krb5.conf:ro,Z

**Describe the results you received:**
Error: error preparing container 0064508ba2c2e530da6d592a68580f38612237c13c24113b58bb51b384516a19 for attach: setxattr /etc/krb5.conf: operation not supported

**Describe the results you expected:**
Running container with mounted /etc/krb5.conf file

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```

Version:      4.0.3

```

comments.body: Do not use `Z`/`z` option if you do not need to relabel the file: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13631
